body_txt: In 1977, DC Comics revealed their first headlining African-American superhero with Black Lightning . But due to numerous controversies and licensing disputes, in the many , many adaptations of the DCU he has often been used via Captain Ersatz . This eventually developed into a consistent pattern in which black superheroes are given Shock and Awe powers. Examples on this page don't necessarily need to be superheroes, though. A Sub-Trope of Fountain of Expies .
